sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: NEOS Investment Management LLC Buys 19,639 Shares of Cardinal Health, Inc. $CAH
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Cardinal Health, Inc. (NYSE:CAH) by 113.8% during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 19,639 shares to bring its total holdings to 36,900 shares valued at $5.77 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the company. Cardinal Health's stock opened at $225.07, and the company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.5107 per share, yielding 0.9% annually.

feed.title: NEOS Investment Management LLC Boosts Position in Biogen Inc. $BIIB
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Biogen Inc. (NASDAQ:BIIB) by 55.7% in the third quarter, holding shares valued at approximately $8.03 million. This increase follows Biogen's exceeding quarterly earnings expectations with $1.99 EPS and $2.28 billion in revenue, leading to a reaffirmed FY2026 guidance. The stock currently trades around $194, and analysts generally rate it as a "Hold" with an average target price of $205.84, despite mixed institutional investor activity.

feed.title: Equinix signs 120MW solar PPA in Japan with Eneos Renewable
feed.summary: Equinix has signed a 15-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) for 121MW of solar power with Eneos Renewable Energy Corp in Japan, its second such deal in the country. This agreement, sourcing from the Sanda Mega Solar Power Plant, is the largest single-unit vPPA by a data center provider in Japan and will help Equinix meet its 100% renewable energy goal for its Japanese data centers. The company continues to expand its presence in Japan, including new hyperscale facilities in Osaka and Tokyo.

feed.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights Nvidia, Taiwan, Bloom Energy, Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, Intel, Nebius and Micron
feed.summary: This Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights how top institutional investors like Druckenmiller, Dalio, Tepper, BlackRock, and Nvidia itself are positioning their portfolios within the AI sector, as revealed through Q4 2025 13F filings. Key purchases include Bloom Energy by Druckenmiller, significant investments in large-cap tech by Dalio, Nvidia's increased stake in Intel, BlackRock's bet on AI infrastructure through Nebius, and Tepper doubling down on Micron. The article underscores 13F filings as a valuable tool for investors to gain insights into "smart money" movements, especially during the accelerating AI revolution.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 196,753 Shares of Devon Energy Corporation $DVN
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. trimmed its stake in Devon Energy Corporation ($DVN) by selling 196,753 shares, though it still holds a significant 12.88% of the company. Despite Devon Energy slightly beating Q4 EPS estimates and declaring a dividend, it reported year-over-year declines in revenue, profit, and operating cash flow, leading to mixed sentiment. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target near $46.32, while other institutional investors have significantly increased their holdings.

feed.title: NEOS Investment Management LLC Purchases 92,972 Shares of VICI Properties Inc. $VICI
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC significantly increased its stake in VICI Properties Inc. during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 92,972 shares to bring its total holdings to 239,287 shares valued at approximately $7.80 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in VICI, a REIT specializing in experiential real estate. The company recently paid a quarterly dividend of $0.45, reflecting a 6.1% yield, and analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $33.85.

feed.title: 5 Revealing Analyst Questions From Applied Materials's Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) exceeded Q4 expectations, driven by strong performance in AI, foundry-logic, and memory segments. The article highlights key analyst questions and management's responses regarding sustainable AI demand, gross margin, order trends, advanced packaging, and capacity expansion. Future catalysts include AI-driven orders, capacity execution, and growth in services and metrology.

feed.title: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Allegion Stock Will Climb or Sink?
feed.summary: Allegion plc (ALLE) has outperformed the broader market and the Industrial Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLI) over the past year, despite a recent dip after reporting Q4 results where adjusted EPS missed expectations. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus for Allegion stock, with a mean price target suggesting a 12.4% upside. The company's performance was bolstered by strong non-residential and electronics growth, although residential markets showed softness.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 35,795 Shares of Darden Restaurants, Inc. $DRI
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. has reduced its stake in Darden Restaurants (DRI) by 0.3%, selling 35,795 shares and now owning 14,019,390 shares valued at approximately $2.67 billion. This comes as company insiders have also sold a significant number of shares recently. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating on Darden with an average price target of $224.78, following its recent earnings report that missed EPS estimates but beat revenue expectations.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Purchases 1,705,570 Shares of Brown & Brown, Inc. $BRO

(NYSE:BRO) by acquiring an additional 1,705,570 shares in the third quarter, bringing its total holding to 37,330,892 shares valued at approximately $3.50 billion. This investment now represents about 10.93% of Brown & Brown, with institutional investors collectively owning 71.01% of the company's stock. Brown & Brown recently reported quarterly earnings that slightly beat analyst expectations for EPS but had revenue that was modestly below consensus, with the firm maintaining a "Hold" rating from analysts with a consensus target price of $90.36.

feed.title: NEOS Investment Management LLC Increases Position in Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated $PEG
feed.summary: NEOS Investment Management LLC significantly increased its stake in Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE:PEG) by 42.4% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 65,409 shares valued at $5.46 million. Several other major institutional investors, including Norges Bank, Bank of America, Invesco, and Vanguard, also substantially boosted their positions, resulting in institutional ownership of 73.34% of the stock. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $90.96, indicating a positive outlook for the utilities provider.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Lowers Holdings in General Mills, Inc. $GIS
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in General Mills (NYSE:GIS) by 3.3% in the third quarter of last year, selling over 2.2 million shares. Despite this, Vanguard remains a significant holder with approximately 12.58% of General Mills' stock. Other institutional investors like State Street Corp and Charles Schwab Investment Management Inc. increased their holdings, while insider Paul Joseph Gallagher sold shares.

feed.title: Canadian Natural Resources Limited $CNQ Shares Sold by JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. significantly reduced its stake in Canadian Natural Resources (NYSE:CNQ) by 0.3% in Q3, selling 44,844 shares but still retaining over 14 million shares worth approximately $449 million. Despite this, other major institutions like Vanguard and Fisher Asset Management increased their holdings, indicating strong institutional interest with 74.03% ownership. Wall Street analysts currently rate CNQ as a "Hold" with an average price target of $48.50, while the stock trades around $41.73.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Reduces Position in Credicorp Ltd. $BAP
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has decreased its stake in Credicorp Ltd. (NYSE:BAP) by 4.4% in the third quarter, reducing its holdings to 1,577,992 shares valued at $420 million. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors have recently bought or increased their positions in the Peruvian financial services holding company. Credicorp, which recently missed its quarterly earnings estimates, currently has an average analyst rating of "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $297.60.

feed.title: Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken AB publ Reduces Stock Position in First Solar, Inc. $FSLR

($FSLR) by 9.3% in the third quarter, selling 5,212 shares and now holding 50,681 shares valued at $11.17 million. This reduction comes amid varied adjustments by other institutional investors, while First Solar's stock saw a 5.5% increase in trading. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the company with an average target price of $275.61.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Sells 297,221 Shares of Northern Trust Corporation $NTRS
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reduced its stake in Northern Trust Corporation by 1.3% in the third quarter, selling 297,221 shares and now owning 11.79% of the company, valued at approximately $3.00 billion. Northern Trust exceeded Q3 EPS estimates, reporting $2.42 per share on $3.15 billion in revenue, an 8.4% increase year-over-year. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.80 per share, and analyst sentiment is mixed with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $148.75.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. $TROW Shares Sold by Vanguard Group Inc.
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. slightly reduced its stake in T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. by 0.1% in the third quarter, though it still holds a significant 12.09% of the company's shares. T. Rowe Price recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.30, offering a 5.5% annual yield, despite missing analyst EPS estimates for the last quarter. Analysts currently have an average "Reduce" rating on the stock with a target price of $102.23.

feed.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Visa, Mastercard, Fiserv, Fidelity National Information Services and Global Payments
feed.summary: The financial transaction services industry is poised for growth due to expanding global trade, rising international travel, and increasing demand for cross-border payments, despite challenges from inflation and high technology spending. Companies like Visa, Mastercard, Fiserv, Fidelity National Information Services, and Global Payments are well-positioned to benefit from these trends. Strategic mergers and acquisitions will further strengthen digital ecosystems and broaden service offerings, with potential interest rate cuts in 2026 making debt financing more attractive for funding acquisitions.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive's Journey Toward Sustainable Procurement
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive is implementing a comprehensive sustainable procurement framework to drive environmental and social change across its global supply chains. The company focuses on achieving net-zero carbon emissions by engaging suppliers in climate education and setting emissions reduction targets. Their approach includes tackling deforestation, upholding human rights through rigorous supplier assessments, and fostering collaborative partnerships to achieve ambitious sustainability goals.

feed.title: Vanguard Group Inc. Buys 852,276 Shares of Veralto Corporation $VLTO
feed.summary: Vanguard Group Inc. reported an increase in its stake in Veralto Corporation (NYSE:VLTO) during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 852,276 shares, bringing its total ownership to over 31 million shares valued at $3.31 billion. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Veralto, which recently announced a boosted quarterly dividend. The company's stock shows a market capitalization of $23.43 billion and has received a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $108.22.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Reduces Position in Fastenal Company $FAST
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. decreased its stake in Fastenal Company by 0.5% in the third quarter of 2025, selling 36,490 shares to hold a total of 7,545,295 shares valued at approximately $370 million. Fastenal recently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.24, resulting in a 2.1% yield, and reported Q3 earnings per share of $0.26, meeting estimates, with revenue of $2.03 billion, slightly below expectations. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the company, while analyst ratings on Fastenal are mixed, with an average target price of $48.18.

feed.title: NYC Pension Funds Sue AT&T Over Workforce Data Disclosure
feed.summary: The New York City Employees' Retirement System and other city pension funds have filed a lawsuit against AT&T Inc., alleging the company violated securities law. The lawsuit claims AT&T declined to share information about its workforce demographics and excluded a related shareholder proposal from its proxy solicitation. This action highlights increasing investor demands for corporate transparency regarding workforce diversity, with New York City Comptroller Brad Lander stating, "We must not let corporations hide information about the diversity of their workforces from shareholders and the public.”

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Seeks Growth Catalyst with Packaging-Free Laundry Innovation
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble is set to unveil "Tide evo," a new waterless and plastic-free laundry detergent, at the CAGNY conference. This innovation aims to revitalize growth after a quarter of stagnant organic sales, showcasing P&G's commitment to product development beyond price increases. The company has reaffirmed its fiscal 2026 guidance, projecting flat to 4% organic sales growth and robust capital returns.

feed.title: ENPHASE ENERGY, INC. (ENPH) INVESTOR ALERT Investors With Large Losses in Enphase Energy, Inc. Should Contact Bernstein Liebhard LLP To Discuss Their Rights
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has announced a securities class action lawsuit on behalf of investors who purchased Enphase Energy Inc. (NASDAQ:ENPH) securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made misrepresentations regarding its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate credit termination effects. Investors with significant losses are encouraged to contact Bernstein Liebhard LLP to discuss their rights and potentially serve as lead plaintiff by April 20, 2026.

feed.title: Rudding Park Selects Agilysys Hospitality Software Solutions to Modernise Guest Journeys and Streamline Operations Across Its Hotel Ecosystem
feed.summary: Rudding Park, an award-winning hotel, spa, and golf resort in Harrogate, has chosen Agilysys hospitality software solutions for a large-scale technology transformation. The resort will adopt a unified Agilysys platform to replace fragmented systems, aiming to enhance the guest experience through seamless booking and personalized service, and improve operational efficiency across all its amenities. This move will centralize data and workflows, providing a holistic view of performance and supporting future growth.

feed.title: LSV Asset Management Has $65,000 Stock Position in Arbor Realty Trust $ABR
feed.summary: LSV Asset Management significantly cut its stake in Arbor Realty Trust ($ABR) by 98.6% in Q3, reducing its holdings to 5,300 shares valued at $65,000. This divestment contrasts with several other large funds that either established or increased substantial positions in ABR. Despite institutional ownership of about 57.25%, analysts generally maintain a "Reduce" rating for Arbor Realty Trust, with an average price target of $9.38 against a current trading price of around $7.41.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group Inc. Decreases Stock Holdings in Mesa Laboratories, Inc. $MLAB
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Mesa Laboratories, Inc. (NASDAQ:MLAB) by 66.2% in the third quarter, selling 19,713 shares and now owning 10,065 shares worth $674,000. Despite this reduction from one institution, other funds like Select Equity Group and Gabelli Funds increased their positions, showing mixed institutional sentiment. The article also provides a comprehensive financial overview of Mesa Laboratories, including its price performance, recent earnings exceeding consensus, upcoming dividend, and analyst ratings which project future growth with an average "Reduce" rating.

feed.title: American Water Works (AWK) Expands Scale with Essential Utilities Merger
feed.summary: American Water Works (AWK) and Essential Utilities (WTRG) shareholders have approved a merger that will create the largest U.S. regulated water and wastewater utility, serving over 4.7 million connections across 17 states. The all-stock, tax-free transaction is expected to close by the end of Q1 2027, subject to regulatory approvals. BofA Securities recently upgraded American Water stock to Neutral, citing the merger's potential to address customer bill burdens and improve EPS expansion outlook.

feed.title: 45,205 Shares in Stoke Therapeutics, Inc. $STOK Acquired by Principal Financial Group Inc.
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group Inc. recently acquired a new position of 45,205 shares in Stoke Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:STOK) during the third quarter, valued at approximately $1,062,000. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in STOK, with several increasing their stakes. The article also details recent analyst ratings which generally recommend a "Buy" or "Moderate Buy" for the stock, and reports on insider selling activity by a director and general counsel of Stoke Therapeutics.

feed.title: Thrivent Financial for Lutherans Sells 45,034 Shares of Invesco BulletShares 2027 Municipal Bond ETF $BSMR
feed.summary: Thrivent Financial for Lutherans significantly reduced its stake in the Invesco BulletShares 2027 Municipal Bond ETF (NASDAQ:BSMR) by 76.3% during the third quarter, selling 45,034 shares and retaining 14,015 shares valued at $332,000. Despite this reduction, other institutional investors like Royal Bank of Canada, Jane Street Group LLC, and Clark Asset Management LLC increased their holdings in BSMR. The ETF recently announced an increased monthly dividend and its stock opened at $23.82.

feed.title: BP Stock’s New Twist: Why Wall Street Suddenly Cares Again
feed.summary: BP is attracting renewed investor interest due to its decision to increase shareholder payouts and temper its aggressive green energy commitments. While its earnings have been stronger than expected and share buybacks are ongoing, the recalibrated green strategy has stirred debate among investors. The company's strong US presence and dividend appeal make it a dollar-priced value play with global energy exposure, positioning it as a potentially attractive option for those seeking income and exposure to commodity cycles.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets Stock: Is Wall Street Sleeping on This Power Play?
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) is presented as a potentially underrated "power play" in the financial market, with strong performance in options trading, index products like VIX, and market data. The article highlights Cboe's growing global derivatives and digital assets footprint, along with AI and tech investments, suggesting it's a solid long-term investment for those betting on continued growth in trading volumes and market complexity. Despite recent stock gains, analysts generally maintain positive ratings, viewing it as a resilient, high-quality exchange franchise rather than a speculative bubble.

feed.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Visa, Mastercard, Fiserv, Fidelity National Information Services and Global Payments
feed.summary: The Financial Transaction Services industry is poised for growth due to expanding global trade, rising international travel, and increased demand for cross-border payments, alongside continued e-commerce growth and a resilient labor market. However, companies face challenges from rising technology expenditures to combat fraud and consumer spending pressures from inflation. Despite perceived industry-wide bearishness, Zacks Equity Research highlights Visa, Mastercard, Fiserv, Fidelity National Information Services, and Global Payments as strong contenders set to benefit from these prevailing trends.

feed.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Ameriprise, SEI Investments and Federated Hermes
feed.summary: The Zacks Investment Management industry is contending with increasing technology and AI expenses, along with a shift towards low-cost passive products, which pressures profitability and margins. Despite these challenges, firms like Ameriprise Financial, SEI Investments Co., and Federated Hermes, Inc. are well-positioned for growth due to rising assets under management (AUM) and strategic initiatives like product innovation and M&As. The industry currently holds a Zacks Industry Rank #137, indicating near-term underperformance, but Zacks highlights these three companies as potential long-term investments.

feed.title: Emerging Sub-Segments Transforming the Dried Soup Market Landscape
feed.summary: The dried soup market is projected to reach $4.63 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 6.5%, driven by demand for convenient, healthy, and sustainable meal solutions. Key trends include plant-based protein soups, increased use of freeze-drying technology, and a focus on clean-label ingredients and sustainable packaging. Major players like Campbell Soup Company are expanding portfolios through acquisitions, and companies are innovating with products like high-protein instant noodle soups to cater to health-conscious consumers.

feed.title: A Shift in Leadership: NVIDIA Tops Holdings in iShares MSCI World ETF
feed.summary: NVIDIA has replaced Apple and Microsoft as the top holding in the iShares MSCI World ETF (URTH), now representing over 5% of the portfolio. This indicates a growing concentration of the ETF in major US technology stocks. Despite strong long-term performance, the fund's heavy tech focus and exclusion of emerging markets differentiate it from broader global alternatives.

feed.title: SAP targets €2.919B 2025 dividend; ADR payouts depend on FX
feed.summary: SAP is proposing a dividend of €2.50 per share for fiscal year 2025, a 6.4% increase from 2024. If approved, the total dividends would amount to approximately €2.919 billion, maintaining a payout ratio of 40.7% which aligns with SAP's policy of distributing 40% or more of Non-IFRS profit after tax. Key dates for the dividend payment are May 5, 2026 (record date), May 6, 2026 (ex-dividend date), and May 8, 2026 (payment date, with ADR payments subject to euro/USD exchange rate fluctuations).

feed.title: Unused digital vouchers get a resale market in VCI Global-Mezzofy deal
feed.summary: VCI Global (NASDAQ: VCIG) has entered into a definitive agreement with Mezzofy to create a majority-controlled Real-World Asset (RWA) Digital Coupon Exchange, aiming to establish a secondary market for digital vouchers. This partnership seeks to commercialize enterprise RWA infrastructure, leveraging Mezzofy's merchant network and expertise, with VCI Global's Smart Bridge retaining majority ownership to lead regulatory and settlement aspects. The initiative targets recurring transaction revenue by addressing the current lack of a structured secondary market for digital vouchers.

feed.title: Optimize AI Models to Generate More Bang for Your Buck
feed.summary: To maximize return on investment, businesses need to optimize their AI models to align with specific business goals, provide valuable insights, and deliver positive financial returns. The article details various optimization techniques such as retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), compression (pruning, quantization), retraining, rehosting and redeploying, and filtering input/output. It also highlights best practices for AI model optimization, including choosing the right technique, ensuring adequate technical resources, supporting experimentation, and defining processes for regular model assessment.

feed.title: Sompo clears regulatory hurdles for Aspen acquisition
feed.summary: Sompo Holdings has secured all necessary antitrust and insurance regulatory approvals for its acquisition of Aspen Insurance Holdings Limited. This acquisition, expected to close shortly, will integrate Aspen's specialty and reinsurance businesses into Sompo's international platform, enhancing its global presence, particularly through Aspen's Lloyd's platform. The next phase will focus on integrating Aspen's operations into Sompo International to create a more diversified property and casualty platform.

feed.title: QUALCOMM Back in the Untethered Trailer Tracking Business
feed.summary: QUALCOMM Inc. has commercially released its T2 Untethered TrailerTRACS Asset Management Solution, re-entering the untethered trailer tracking market after a three-year hiatus. The new system uses digital cellular as its primary communication mode, with analog cellular as a backup, and has been committed for installation on 48,000 trailers by Schneider National. This advanced satellite/cellular system provides rapid-status visibility into trailer locations, operational events, and vehicle position reporting for improved fleet utilization and security.

feed.title: Qualcomm to invest up to $150 Million for strategic AI Venture Fund in India
feed.summary: Qualcomm has announced plans to invest up to $150 million in India's technology and AI startup ecosystem through its venture arm, Qualcomm Ventures. The investments will target startups at all stages, with a key focus on AI applications in automotive, IoT, robotics, and mobile. This initiative aims to support India's vibrant innovation landscape and advance edge AI, building on Qualcomm's existing commitments and expertise in the region.

feed.title: Arista Networks (ANET) Valuation Check After Earnings Beat And Higher AI Revenue Targets
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) is gaining investor attention after reporting strong Q4 2025 earnings, an increased 2026 revenue outlook, and a higher AI networking revenue target. Despite recent market fluctuations, the company's share price shows positive momentum. While one valuation model suggests a 9.8% overvaluation, another, based on discounted cash flow, indicates an 8.5% undervaluation, prompting investors to consider both perspectives for long-term cash generation potential.

feed.title: Is Union Pacific (UNP) Still Attractive After Recent Share Price Strength?
feed.summary: Union Pacific (UNP) has seen significant share price strength recently, with returns of 48.6% over three years and 40.4% over five years. Despite this, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 16.0%, with an estimated intrinsic value of $315.65 compared to its current price of $265.00. Additionally, its P/E ratio of 22.03x is below its proprietary "Fair Ratio" of 25.42x, further indicating potential undervaluation.

feed.title: Keysight Unveils 3D Interconnect Designer for Chiplet and 3DIC Advanced Package Designs
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies has launched 3D Interconnect Designer, a new addition to its Electronic Design Automation (EDA) portfolio to address the increasing complexity of 3D interconnect designs for chiplet and 3DIC advanced packages. This tool streamlines the design and optimization process, minimizing errors and accelerating time-to-market for products in AI infrastructure and data center applications. It integrates with existing EDA workflows and supports open industry standards, offering precise electrical analysis and reducing compliance risks.

feed.title: Xenon Pharmaceuticals Target of Unusually High Options Trading (NASDAQ:XENE)
feed.summary: Xenon Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:XENE) experienced unusually high options trading activity, with traders acquiring 4,063 put options, a 2,362% increase over the average, signaling bearish sentiment. This comes despite the stock having a consensus "Buy" rating and trading higher on the reported day. The article also notes significant insider selling, including a large transaction by the CEO, alongside institutional inflows and various analyst ratings.

feed.title: MarketAxess Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:MKTX) Receives Average Recommendation of "Hold" from Brokerages
feed.summary: MarketAxess Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:MKTX) has an average "Hold" recommendation from brokerages, with an average 1-year target price of $200.40. The company recently missed earnings estimates, reporting an EPS of $1.68 and revenue of $209.41M, though revenue increased 3.5% year-over-year. MarketAxess also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.78, resulting in an annualized dividend of $3.12 and a yield of 1.8%.

feed.title: Bos Telkom (TLKM) Bocorkan Persyaratan jadi Mitra Strategis Infranexia
feed.summary: PT Telkom Indonesia Tbk (TLKM) is actively seeking strategic partners for its subsidiary, InfraNexia, with CEO Dian Siswarini revealing the desired criteria. Telkom aims for partners who can bring significant value in technology, international market access, and strong governance, ideally acquiring a minority stake. The telecommunications giant is also looking for partners capable of attracting both domestic and international clients, emphasizing agility and innovation despite being a state-owned enterprise.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Given Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from twenty-seven analysts, with 14 buy ratings and 13 hold ratings, and an average 12-month price target of approximately $339.73. The company reported strong Q4 EPS of $5.23, exceeding estimates, with revenue up 7.1% year-over-year fueled by loan growth. JPMorgan plans significant expansion in 2026, opening over 160 new Chase branches, and analysts suggest rising AI costs could benefit large banks like JPM by driving smaller bank mergers.

feed.title: Assured Guaranty (AGO) to Release Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Assured Guaranty (NYSE:AGO) is scheduled to release its Q4 2025 earnings after market close on Thursday, February 26th, with analysts projecting $1.54 EPS and approximately $205.8 million in revenue. The company's stock opened at $87.10, showing a slight decrease, and has a market capitalization of $4.02 billion. Insider selling and institutional investor activity have been noted, while analysts generally rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $101.00.
